summary: Comprehensive testing completed for KodakGP OSRS Gold & Scripts Marketplace. All core functionality working perfectly - storefront, e-commerce, user authentication, admin panel, and market features.
passed_tests: All 16 backend API endpoints (100% success rate)
Homepage loads with hero section and live prices ticker
Add to cart functionality for gold products
Cart page displays items with quantity controls
Checkout flow with RSN input field
Admin panel with orders, products, users tabs
Live gold prices display and market statistics
